title: SMM2 Ghost House Menu BGM
description: Makes a mashup of the 3D World Ghost House + the Mario Maker 2 edit theme play on the title screen.
body:
As a way to combine my adoration for Super Mario Maker 2 with Minecraft, I've created a resource pack that plays a mashup mix of the Super Mario 3D World Ghost House theme with the respective edit mode theme on the title screen. Supports music toasts in English US.

To be honest, I forgot why I made this exactly, but it's not a bad song, and in my opinion, 3D World had the best ghost house music.

Here's the song used for the pack:
